introSection: Ba-a-a Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Europa-Park in Rust, Baden Wuerttemberg, Germany.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Ba-a-a Express opened on 13 July 2016 as part of Europa-Park's new-for-2016 Ireland – Children's World area.

fullText:
Ba-a-a Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Europa-Park in Rust, Baden Wuerttemberg, Germany.

Ba-a-a Express opened on 13 July 2016 as part of Europa-Park's new-for-2016 Ireland – Children's World area.
